// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT
pragma solidity 0.8.20;

contract Implementation {
    bytes32 private constant IMPL_SLOT =
        0x360894a13ba1a3210667c828492db98dca3e2076cc3735a920a3ca505d382bbc;

    // Mimic OZ Initializable's _initializing flag — set at the start of
    // initialize() and cleared at the end so the SSTORE_CLEAR refund fires.
    uint256 private _initializing;

    address public addr1;
    address public addr2;
    address public addr3;
    uint256 public val1;
    uint256 public val2;
    uint256 public val3;
    uint256 public val4;
    uint256 public val5;
    uint256[] public list;
    bytes public buf;

    event Initialized(address indexed who);

    function initialize(
        address _a1, address _a2, address _a3,
        uint256 _v1, uint256 _v2, uint256 _v3, uint256 _v4, uint256 _v5,
        uint256[] calldata extras,
        bytes calldata blob
    ) external {
        _initializing = 1;
        addr1 = _a1; addr2 = _a2; addr3 = _a3;
        val1 = _v1; val2 = _v2; val3 = _v3; val4 = _v4; val5 = _v5;
        for (uint256 i = 0; i < extras.length; i++) { list.push(extras[i]); }
        buf = blob;
        emit Initialized(msg.sender);
        _initializing = 0; // refund-eligible SSTORE
    }
}

// MinimalProxy.sol — see EthModuleGasEstimationDSLTest.java for the
// creation-bytecode constant; the proxy is *not* deployed here because
// the test wants to call eth_estimateGas on the proxy creation tx itself.
end

account_new acc1 50000000

# Deploy Implementation (creation bytecode of Implementation.sol above).
transaction_build tx01
    sender acc1
    nonce 0
    receiverAddress 00
    value 0
    data 
    gas 3000000
    build

block_build b01
    parent g00
    gasLimit 7500000
    transactions tx01
    build

block_connect b01
assert_best b01
